ddls:
CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the notification */,
  "text" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been sent (1) or not (0) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or task this notification is targeting */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., task assignment, team addition, comment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "seen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been seen by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
